judge_scores.reasoning: The model incorrectly states that Lula was 'inocentado' (acquitted/declared innocent), which conflates the annulment of convictions with a declaration of innocence.
The model incorrectly states that Lula was inocentado, implying he was declared innocent, when in fact his convictions were annulled on procedural grounds.

The response correctly mentions the jurisdictional annulment but critically conflates it with exoneration by stating Lula was 'inocentado' (acquitted/found innocent), when in fact the convictions were annulled on procedural grounds without any ruling on the merits of the accusations.
